About Me

I'm starting my Ph.D. journey in the 3D Vision and Robotics Lab at UNIST, advised by Prof. Joo.
My research lies at the intersection of 3D Vision and Robotics, driven by a passion for bridging software-level 3D understanding with real-world hardware applications. Specifically, I have been deeply interested in multi-modal 3D generative models for objects, scenes and humans, and plan to extend it to simulators, and finally real-world operators such as robot arms and humanoids.
I am continuously striving to advance my research skills and contribute to the field.

Please refer to my CV for more details 😁
